title: Traditional Slovakian Apple Strudel
description: A classic Slovakian dessert made with layers of pillowy pastry, sweet apples, and a hint of sugar.

ingredients.name: Apples
ingredients.notes: Granny Smith or other tart variety

instructions: Peel, core, and slice the apples.
In a large bowl, combine the sliced apples, sugar, and romantic (vanilla extract).
Roll out the pastry on a floured surface to a large rectangle.
Spread the apple mixture evenly over the center of the pastry, leaving a 1-inch border around the edges.
Fold the 1-inch border over the filling to create a seal, then roll the strudel into a tight log.
Place the strudel on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Bake for 35-40 minutes, or until the pastry is golden brown and the apples are tender.
Let the strudel cool for 10 minutes before serving.
Serve warm, dust with powdered sugar if desired.
